policy_name: ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance (Health Shield)

min_entry_age.source_quote: Newborn Baby means baby born during the Policy Period and is aged upto 90 days. Non-Network Provider means any Hospital, day care centre or other provider

sum_insured_options.source_quote: 3 lacs/ 4 lacs/ 5 lacs Sum Insured (Rs.) 7 lacs/ 10 lacs 15lacs / 20lacs / 25Lacs / 50lacs d. Benefits covered Medical Expenses incurred due to Illness up to 30 days period immediately before and 60 days immediately after an

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: (d) Initial waiting period: 30 days for all illnesses (except Hospitalisation due to injury).

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: (a) Pre-existing diseases: Declared and accepted PED will be covered after 24 months of continuous coverage.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: (c) Specific waiting period: First 24 months, for specific Illness and treatment.

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre & Post Hospitalisation Medical Expenses incurred due to Illness up to 30 days period immediately before and 60 days immediately after

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: 30 days period immediately before and 60 days immediately after an Insured Person's admission to a Hospital

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (ICICI Lombard Complete Health iHealth Annexure I; 150 procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: In Patient AYUSH Hospitalization - We will reimburse expenses for AYUSH treatment only when the treatment has been undergone in a AYUSH Hospital or AYUSH Day Care Centre. We will not cover expenses for Hospitalization done for evaluation or investigation only.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Code- Excl18: Maternity: Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy. Expenses towards miscarriage (unless due to an accident) and lawful medical termination of

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Donor Expenses: Medical Expenses incurred in respect of the donor expenses up to Sum insured ... subject to a limit of Rs.10 Lakhs. The limit for this cover is over and above annual sum insured

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Additional Sum Insured (Cumulative bonus) An additional sum insured of 10% of annual sum insured for each completed and continuous claim free Policy Year subject to a maximum of 50%

restoration_benefit.value: Unlimited Reset Benefit (available unlimited times per policy year)
restoration_benefit.source_quote: Unlimited Reset Benefit ... will be available unlimited times in a policy year in case the Sum insured ... is insufficient

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Cashless Facility available at over 6500+ network hospitals.

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless or Reimbursement of covered medical expenses up to specified Sum Insured as per the scope of cover.

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: mplete set of documents & information, We will respond within 4 hours of the actual receipt of such pre authorization request wi

policy_type.source_quote: We will indemnify the Medical Expenses so incurred by You. However, Our total liability under this Policy for payment of any and all Claims in aggregate during each Policy Year of the Policy Period shall not exceed the Maximum Limit of Indemnity as

_meta.notes: ICICI Lombard Complete Health Insurance (Health Shield retail variant): clean Key Information Sheet. 24-month PED, 30/60 pre/post, Unlimited Reset, NCB 10% per claim-free year capped 50%. | Batch 3 (2026-05-15): coverage breadth fields backfilled.

ambulance_cover.source_quote: Road Ambulance: We will cover the expenses incurred on road ambulance services which are offered by a healthcare or ambulance service provider and which have been used during the Policy Period to transfer the Insured Person to the nearest Hospital with adequate
